response.justification: Bogdan has over 15 years of full-stack experience with deep proficiency in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud tools like Docker and AWS — all core to the role — plus direct experience with AI-agent infrastructure and testing frameworks like Vitest equivalents. His open-source contributions, architectural versatility, and proven track record in enterprise automation and scalability align strongly with the job’s demands.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React matching primary stack perfectly
Proven AI-agent infrastructure development and experience with MCP/agent workflows
Strong DevOps and infrastructure background with Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD, and cloud platforms
concerns: Limited explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in resume (though Node/TypeScript/Test experience is solid)
German language skill is only basic, which may hinder collaboration in Berlin-based teams
Resume is dense with diverse technologies; potential risk of fragmentation without clear recent focus
